caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a dark wooden podium in a room with a green marble textured wall and a decorative gold-trimmed pillar. He is dressed in a light beige traditional Indian outfit featuring a long-sleeved shirt and a sleeveless white Nehru jacket. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. In the initial stages, he stands still, looking forward while speaking. He then raises his left hand, gesturing with his fingers as he continues to address his audience. By the final stage, he lowers his hand and returns to a steady posture behind the podium. The background remains constant throughout the sequence, and no text or logos are visible on screen.
